THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LABRIE, JOSEPH G. R. AKA BOB LABRIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 19 RAUSCH ST., STAYED UNTIL FEB-22-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, ON OR BEFORE 2/13/95 PLTF. SHALL DELIVER SUM OF $2000.00 TO DEFT. FOR MOVING EXPENSES; PROVIDING THAT DEFT. LEAVE PREMISES BY 2/22/95, DEFT. WILL BE ALLOWED TO LEAVE HIS PERSONAL PROPERTY ON PREMISES UNTIL 3/8/95; (SEE FILE FOR MORE SPECIFICS AND DETAIL).
